description_long: This is a modern tactical knife with a single-edged, slightly curved blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of dark, possibly coated metal, with a straight spine and a subtle angular transition near the tip, suggesting a tanto-inspired geometry. The handle is ergonomically contoured, featuring a textured grip for secure handling and a slight finger guard integrated into the design. The overall construction is robust and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. The knife is entirely black, giving it a sleek, stealthy appearance suitable for practical or tactical use. There is no visible sheath or scabbard included with the object.
description: A modern, all-black tactical knife with a single-edged, slightly curved blade and a textured ergonomic handle. The design is sleek, robust, and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, highlighting the curved blade and contoured handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view from the blade tip, showing the thin profile and the handle's ribbed grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the blade's curve and the ergonomic handle design.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the handle end, emphasizing the blade's thinness and the handle's straight alignment.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, slightly curved, tanto-inspired, straight spine
attribute_handle_design: contoured, textured polymer grip, ergonomic, ribbed surface
